3181160.name: Late Emergency
3181160.description:
Late Emergency is a horror experience where your goal is to quickly explore an abandoned waterpark after you received an emergency message from your friend. The more time you spend there, the more twisted will be the outcome. You'll find yourself in a pretty dangerous situation and you'll start to fear for your own life as you're the guest to this place.

Your friend called you and said that he's in danger and that you have to come help him. When you asked where he is, he said Planty's aqualand. You leave your house in a hurry and now your only mission is to look for your friend as FAST as possible...

Try to get through the park as fast as possible, get new records, new endings and more. Find your way through the once joyful place full of terrifying secrets and mysteries. Find buttons, levers, messages and more while being hunted by the residents of this park.

Currently Available Zones: 1

Currently Available Levels: 2 

NEW UPDATE/LEVEL EVERY WEEK FOR FREE
3181160.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
